title: Šibenik History & Coffee with a Local Guide | Private Walking Tours by Ivana
description: A private Šibenik walking tour plus a relaxed coffee with your local guide. History, hidden corners, and authentic local recommendations. About 3 hours, €180 per group.
keywords: Šibenik history and coffee tour, Šibenik local experience, private guide Šibenik coffee, authentic Šibenik tour
